title: About
text: Hi! My name is Rebecca. I am currently a Masters of Data Science student at the University of British Columbia. Previously, I have worked in both the political and non-profit sectors, specializing in transforming raw data into actionable insights to solve complex problems and drive meaningful impact. I’ve led and executed high-impact data projects, including building data integration processes and creating visualizations that provide clarity for stakeholders. I’ve worked with national clients and built robust systems for automated reporting and analysis. In addition to my technical skills, I am experienced in collaborating cross-functionally with leadership teams, translating business needs into technical requirements, and driving project success from start to finish.

title: Rebecca Sokol-Snyder
text: Meticulously organized and fiercely passionate about using data to advance causes I care about.
